daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are helping you see things from a fresh angle. Trust your gut instinct when something feels off—your intuition is basically your superpower rn.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, today's about genuine conversation over surface-level stuff. Single? Someone might slide into your orbit who actually gets your vibe. Stay open.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Don't hold back from sharing that project concept or thought you've been sitting on. Your voice matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually rest. Movement feels good, but so does being still. Listen to what you genuinely need, not what you think you *should* do.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about recalibrating and getting real with yourself. Mercury's giving you clarity on what actually matters, so trust those gut feelings. Something's shifting beneath the surface—lean into it.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, this is about authenticity over performance. Stop trying to be the 'perfect' partner and let people see the messy, real you. That's where genuine connection actually lives, bestie.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaking, but don't get lost in perfectionism. Take that unconventional idea seriously—your perspective is exactly what's needed right now. Small moves matter more than grand gestures.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Skip the intense routines and focus on what actually feels good—stretching, walks, rest. Mental health check-in: journaling could unlock some helpful realizations about your patterns.
